title: MekaJadeUpgrades Unofficial
description: Mekanism addon to add extra tooltips on Jade to show installed upgrades. (Unofficial 1.20.1 Port)
body:
# MekaJadeUpgrades (Unofficial 1.20.1 Port)

[![Available for](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available_for-1.20.1_(Forge)-green)]()
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)]()  
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-MekaJadeUpgrades-blue.svg?logo=github)](https://github.com/mochi-753/MekaJadeUpgrades)
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-MekaJadeUpgrades--Unofficial-orange.svg?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekajadeupgrades-unofficial)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-MekaJadeUpgrades--Unofficial-green.svg?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/project/mekajadeupgrades-unofficial)

### Description
This is an **unofficial 1.20.1 port** of the **MekaJadeUpgrades** mod.
This addon bridges Mekanism and Jade, adding extra tooltips to the Jade HUD that display the installed upgrades inside Mekanism machines.

### Disclaimer
**This is an UNOFFICIAL port.** Please **DO NOT** report any bugs, issues, or crashes related to this 1.20.1 version to the original author.

### Features
* Displays installed Mekanism upgrades directly in the Jade tooltip.
* Quickly check machine status without opening the GUI.

### Dependencies
To use this mod, the following dependencies are required:
* **Minecraft:** 1.20.1
* **Mod Loader:** Forge
* **[Mekanism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekanism):** `10.4.16` or higher
* **[Jade 🔍](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade):** `11.13` or higher

### Credits
* **Original Author:** DevDyna
* **Original Project:** [MekaJadeUpgrades](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekajadeupgrades)

### License
This project is licensed under the MIT License.
*(Note: As this is a port, it inherits the MIT License from the original project. See `LICENSE-Original` for details.)*
